identity.notes: 1X公式NEO製品ページ、公式注文ページ、公式発売記事、公式About/AI情報を確認。

positioningFacts.statement: Home Robot for household chores, personal assistance and companionship
autonomous by default with scheduled 1X Expert remote supervision for unknown chores
Early Access ownership $20000 or $499/month subscription; US deliveries start 2026

mobility.rawValue: fully mobile humanoid robot; bipedal walking, sitting, kneeling and stair climbing
mobility.evidenceSummary: 1X公式AIページが歩行・座位・跪き・階段昇降を記載。

heightCm.condition: official hardware table converted from imperial units
heightCm.evidenceSummary: 公式仕様表の5ft6inをcmへ換算。

weightKg.condition: official hardware table converted from imperial units
weightKg.evidenceSummary: 公式仕様表の66lbをkgへ換算。

speedMps.rawValue: hands 8.0m/s; max run speed 6.2m/s; walking speed 1.4m/s
speedMps.condition: normalized value is walking speed; maximum run and hand speed retained in rawValue
speedMps.evidenceSummary: 歩行1.4m/sをカード向け代表値にし、最大走行6.2m/s・手8.0m/sと区別した。

dof.rawValue: current NEO product table: hands 22×2, arms 7×2, neck 3, spine 2, legs 6×2 = 75 total; 1X NEO Hands announcement (2026-07-09): 25 DoF per hand
dof.condition: latest hand hardware update conflicts with product table; total depends on shipped hand configuration
dof.evidenceSummary: 現行製品表と2026-07-09公式ハンド発表のDoFが異なるため単一値にしない。

payloadKg.rawValue: lift 154lb, carry 55lb and arm payload 18lb are retained in loadRatings
payloadKg.evidenceSummary: 公式荷重表記はscope付きloadRatingsへ分離。

runtimeMin.condition: official battery table; operating condition not stated

batteryCapacityWh.evidenceSummary: 公式仕様表が容量842Whを直接記載。

chargeTimeMin.condition: charge-rate statement, not a full-charge duration
chargeTimeMin.evidenceSummary: 6分/稼働時間は充電率であり、満充電時間へ換算していない。

batterySystem.rawValue: self-charge; robot plugs itself in when needed
batterySystem.evidenceSummary: NEOが自律的に充電器へ接続する機能を確認。電池化学系は非公開。

controlMethod.rawValue: autonomous default; voice interface; mobile app; scheduled 1X Expert remote supervision; remote control through app and VR device
controlMethod.normalizedValue: autonomous / voice / mobile app / VR remote control / scheduled expert
controlMethod.evidenceSummary: 公式製品ページが自律・音声・モバイル・VR・Expert方式を記載。

sdk.rawValue: no public NEO SDK/API package found; app, voice and Expert operation are end-user interfaces
sdk.condition: do not treat app or Redwood AI as SDK

computePlatform.rawValue: 1X NEO Cortex (Nvidia Jetson Thor); up to 2070 FP4 TFLOPS
computePlatform.evidenceSummary: 公式仕様表の搭載チップ・AI演算性能。

ipRating.evidenceSummary: 手と本体の等級を分けて記録。

operatingTemperature.rawValue: operating temperature not published on reviewed NEO product/order pages
operatingTemperature.evidenceSummary: 動作温度は確認できない。

safetyStandard.rawValue: soft body, no pinchpoints and HIC <250 are safety metrics; no named standard/certification number found
safetyStandard.condition: safety metrics are not a standard
safetyStandard.evidenceSummary: 安全設計・HIC値は確認したが、規格番号はない。

loadRatings.condition: official arm payload 18lb converted to kg; rated/maximum semantics not stated
official lift 154lb converted to kg; body scope inferred from wording only, not rated/maximum
official carry 55lb converted to kg; carrier wording, not rated/maximum

useCaseGaps: USE_CASE_GAP onex-neo "household chores / personal domestic assistance / companionship" https://www.1x.tech/neo

usageExamples.title: NEO In Your Home
usageExamples.summary: 1X公式Aboutのタイムラインが、2025年のprivate early accessと2026年のEarly Access customer homesへの展開開始を記載する。

marketAvailability.rawValue: official order page offers $20000 ownership or $499/month subscription; $200 refundable deposit and US deliveries start 2026
marketAvailability.evidenceSummary: 公式注文ページの価格・予約・配送条件。

japanAvailability.rawValue: official launch says deliveries primarily US in 2026 and expansion to other markets from 2027; Japan is not named
japanAvailability.evidenceSummary: 日本の具体的配送可否は未確認。

distributorJapan.evidenceSummary: 日本語ロケール注文ページは確認したが、国内代理店はない。

supportNote.rawValue: Early Access ownership includes 3-year warranty, premium support and priority delivery; subscription includes starter productivity package
supportNote.evidenceSummary: 公式注文ページの保証・サポート情報。

sourceCandidates.reason: 2026-07-09 official announcement gives 25 DoF hands, conflicting with NEO product table's 22 DoF per hand.

conflicts: NEO product table lists 22 DoF per hand and 75 total by component sum; 2026-07-09 official NEO Hands announcement says 25 DoF per hand, so total depends on shipped hand generation.
Official launch says expansion to other markets from 2027 but does not name Japan.
humanReviewRequired: NEO shipping configuration/hand generation must be fixed before publishing total DoF and arm/hand scope.
Japan delivery, tax, subscription terms, final purchase invitation and support availability must be confirmed.

identity.notes: 1X公式EVE製品ページ、公式About、公式rebranding発表、公式World Model記事を確認。NEOの数値をEVEへ流用していない。

positioningFacts.statement: EVE Industrial is a wheeled factory humanoid/android
EVE deployed in customer factories globally to handle industrial tasks autonomously
EVE data includes mobile manipulation tasks in homes and offices for world-model research

mobility.evidenceSummary: 公式Aboutがwheeled factory humanoidと直接記載。

heightCm.rawValue: EVE height not published on reviewed official EVE/About pages

dof.rawValue: EVE degrees of freedom not published

payloadKg.evidenceSummary: 荷重値は確認できない。

runtimeMin.evidenceSummary: 稼働時間は確認できない。

chargeTimeMin.evidenceSummary: 充電時間は確認できない。

batterySystem.condition: do not import NEO self-charge system
batterySystem.evidenceSummary: NEOの電池情報を流用していない。

controlMethod.rawValue: autonomous handling of industrial tasks; mobile manipulation data also collected for world-model research
controlMethod.condition: official About and World Model descriptions
controlMethod.evidenceSummary: 公式が工場内自律タスクを記載。

sdk.rawValue: EVE SDK or public developer package not found
sdk.condition: world-model dataset/research is not an SDK
sdk.evidenceSummary: 研究記事はあるがSDKは確認できない。

computePlatform.condition: do not import NEO Jetson Thor

ipRating.evidenceSummary: 防塵防水等級は確認できない。

safetyStandard.rawValue: safe/capable platform positioning found but no EVE safety standard/certification number
safetyStandard.condition: safety positioning is not a standard
safetyStandard.evidenceSummary: 安全な共存プラットフォームという位置付けはあるが規格番号はない。

officialUseCases.officialExpression: mobile manipulation tasks in homes and offices / world-model research
officialUseCases.reason: 公式研究記事がEVEを使ったデータ収集・世界モデル研究を明示する。

useCaseGaps: USE_CASE_GAP onex-eve "autonomous industrial factory task handling" https://www.1x.tech/about

usageExamples.title: Announcing rebranding: From Halodi Robotics to 1X
usageExamples.summary: 1XがEVEを米国で商用androidとして大規模展開し、ノルウェー・Dallasの製造能力を構築していると発表。

usageExamples.title: 1X World Model
usageExamples.summary: EVEで家庭・オフィスの移動マニピュレーションを数千時間収集し、世界モデルの学習・評価に用いた研究。

marketAvailability.rawValue: official About says EVE was deployed in customer facilities globally; dedicated EVE page is a contact form, no public price
marketAvailability.evidenceSummary: 企業向け導入実績と問い合わせ窓口を確認。

japanAvailability.evidenceSummary: 日本販売・導入窓口は確認できない。

distributorJapan.evidenceSummary: 国内正規代理店はない。

supportNote.rawValue: official EVE contact form and 1X research/product pages are public; Japan support not stated
supportNote.evidenceSummary: 公式EVE問い合わせ窓口を確認。

sourceCandidates.reason: Official company timeline says EVE deployed in factories globally; no numeric specifications are provided.

conflicts: EVE has enterprise deployment statements but no public product specification table or price.
NEO product data were intentionally not applied to EVE.
humanReviewRequired: EVE customer-specific configuration, height, weight, speed, DoF, payload, runtime, battery, SDK, compute, IP, temperature and safety standard to be confirmed from an enterprise datasheet.
Japan procurement/distributor/support status must be confirmed.
